Joining a Yakuza was not in your bucket list. Well yes, you met a hot mafia guy that you only see in the wattpad books written by a 14 year old on your way to a strip club, but you didn't expect to be a fucking child of a dumb, useless dad that was the right hand of the Guren-kai's bossтАФ Katsuo's dad. Curious enough, you tried asking Katsuo where your father isтАФ Kei. Of course he doesn't know, if he does, that would be too boring aye? Anyways. He suggested you to search for Y┼л, the yakuza's intelligent hacker. Not just any intelligent hacker, he's disgustingly intelligent to the point his only weakness is his laziness. Katsuo told you the directions of his room, yada yada yada and boom you're in front of his door. And then you open
